user.title: HausMan Hub HASC settings
user.description: Initial setup grants no device control. Climate rollout is configured separately and remains disabled by default.

data_description.mode: Normal information reading shows aggregate counts. The additional check also compares data without changing anything.

error.unsafe_mode: Only read-only and comparison-without-changes modes are allowed.

abort.already_configured: HASC is already configured. Change its settings from the integration page.

init.title: HASC: choose a settings area
init.description: Choose one area. The next screen shows only its relevant fields. For normal climate setup, start with rooms and devices, then connect the existing climate controller separately.

data_description.settings_section: Rooms and devices is the main setup wizard. Climate connection configures the safe connection mode and address. General information and the service test are separate.

general_settings.title: HASC: general information
general_settings.description: These settings only affect the page with aggregate home counts. They do not connect climate or control devices.

data_description.mode: Normal reading is suitable for continuous operation. The additional check only compares data without changing anything.
data_description.local_summary_enabled: The page shows nine aggregate counts for areas, devices, and entities. It contains no names or controls.
data_description.summary_update_interval: Fifteen minutes is recommended. This does not affect climate-control response time.

test_switch.title: HASC: service switch test
test_switch.description: This is not climate control. The service test creates one test control only for a Home Assistant Input boolean helper. Leave it off if you do not need this test.

data.canary_control_target: Input boolean helper for the test

data_description.canary_control_enabled: Turning this off immediately removes the HASC test control.
data_description.canary_control_target: Select one manually created Input boolean helper. Climate, lights, locks, and other devices are not allowed.

climate_connection.title: HASC: climate-controller connection
climate_connection.description: Choose how HASC connects to the existing climate controller. Use check-only mode for the first connection. One-room trial control comes later, after successful room checks.

data.climate_bridge_mode: How to connect the climate controller

data_description.climate_bridge_mode: Disabling immediately closes commands and removes the saved address. Check-only mode only reads and compares data.

climate_endpoint.title: HASC: climate-controller address
climate_endpoint.description: Enter where the existing climate controller runs. HASC adds the required service paths. One-room trial control also requires one previously verified stable room ID.

data.climate_bridge_target: Local climate-controller IP address and port
data.climate_canary_room_id: Stable ID of the verified room

data_description.climate_bridge_target: Example: http://192.168.1.10:1880. Enter only the protocol, local IP, and port, without paths, DNS names, credentials, or parameters.
data_description.climate_canary_room_id: This is not a room name or Home Assistant entity. Use a stable ID from the saved HASC registry, for example living.

climate_registry.title: Climate device setup
climate_registry.description: Select devices from a fresh read-only import or add them manually, then review the complete draft. Nothing is saved before the separate confirmation step.

data_description.climate_registry_action: Choose the next guided setup step. Advanced JSON is optional.

climate_import_candidate.title: Select a Climate API device
climate_import_candidate.description: HASC performs only a fresh read-only import. The list shows a name and room while the private source ID is neither displayed nor typed. The selection changes only the temporary draft.

climate_import_device.title: Configure the imported device
climate_import_device.description: Set the public HASC ID and policy fields, then choose the control entity with Home Assistant's native selector. HASC rechecks the fresh candidate, supplies its private binding, and shows the normal preview. This step sends no command and saves nothing.

data_description.climate_device_id: Use a stable lowercase ID; only this ID enters the Android contract.
data_description.climate_device_control_entity: Select the entity instead of copying its ID. It remains only in the draft until separate confirmation.

climate_preflight_candidate.title: Select a room for canary preflight
climate_preflight_candidate.description: Select one room from the saved HASC registry. The check reads current rollout state but cannot activate canary or send a climate command.

climate_canary_preflight.title: Climate canary preflight
climate_canary_preflight.description: Room {room_id}: {status}. Registry match: {registry_matches}; devices matched/missing/moved/unregistered: {matched_devices}/{missing_devices}/{moved_devices}/{unregistered_devices}. Shadow: {shadow_status}, observations {matched}/{required_matched}, translated actions {translated}/{required_actions}, anomalies {anomalies}. Qualified scope: {scope_qualified} ({scope}). Operation: {operation}. Disabled rollback: {rollback}. Reasons: {reasons}. This screen never activates canary; separate authorization is still required.

data_description.close_canary_preflight: Enable only to close this read-only result. No setting, registry entry, or device is changed.

climate_registry_room.title: Add or replace a climate room
climate_registry_room.description: A repeated stable room ID replaces that draft room. The draft remains unsaved.

climate_registry_device.title: Add or replace a climate device
climate_registry_device.description: Describe one logical HASC device. A repeated stable device ID replaces that draft device. Controllable devices require one control entity; passive sensors must leave it empty and remain observed.

climate_shadow_candidate.title: Choose a shadow candidate room
climate_shadow_candidate.description: This read-only check evaluates one public HASC room ID. It never sends a climate command.

climate_shadow_evidence.title: Climate shadow evidence
climate_shadow_evidence.description: Room {room_id}: {status}. Matching samples: {matched}/{required_matched}; required shadow actions: {translated}/2; anomalies: {anomalies}; rejected intents across the window: {global_rejected}; reasons: {reasons}. This result grants no physical authority.

data_description.close_shadow_evidence: Enable this only to close the read-only result. No setting or device is changed.

climate_registry_json.title: Advanced climate registry JSON
climate_registry_json.description: Optional advanced editor for the complete private registry. The next step still previews it and requires separate confirmation.

data_description.climate_registry_json: The installed v1 JSON Schema is authoritative. Private source/entity bindings never enter the tablet contract.

climate_registry_confirm.title: Confirm climate registry
climate_registry_confirm.description: Preview status: {status}. Rooms: {room_count}; devices: {device_count}; reasons: {reasons}. Confirm to atomically replace the registry.

data_description.confirm_registry_save: Nothing is saved unless this separate confirmation is enabled.

error.unsafe_settings_section: Choose one of the four HASC settings areas.
error.unsafe_mode: Only read-only and comparison-without-changes modes are allowed.
error.unsafe_local_summary_setting: The optional local page can only be turned on or off.
error.unsafe_summary_update_interval: Choose only 5, 15, or 30 minutes for the nine-count refresh.
error.unsafe_canary_control_setting: The control canary can only be armed or disarmed.
error.unsafe_canary_control_target: An armed control canary requires exactly one input_boolean helper.
error.unsafe_climate_bridge_mode: Choose disabled, shadow, or canary for the climate bridge.
error.unsafe_climate_bridge_target: Use one private literal HTTP(S) origin without a path or credentials.
error.unsafe_climate_canary_room: Canary mode requires one stable lowercase room ID.
error.climate_runtime_unavailable: The loaded HASC climate runtime is unavailable.
error.invalid_climate_registry: The registry must be valid bounded HASC climate registry JSON v1.
error.climate_registry_locked: Registry changes are locked while the climate bridge is in canary mode.
error.invalid_climate_registry_action: Choose one approved registry setup action.
error.invalid_climate_room: Use one stable lowercase room ID and a non-empty room name.
error.invalid_climate_device: The device fields, required capabilities, ownership, scope, and control entity do not form a valid HASC device.
error.climate_registry_needs_room: Add at least one room before adding a device.
error.climate_import_unavailable: A fresh read-only Climate API import is unavailable. Configure the shadow target and check its state without enabling canary.
error.climate_import_no_candidates: The fresh import has no new supported candidates for this draft.
error.invalid_climate_candidate: The candidate changed, is already present, or cannot form a safe typed device. Refresh the selection and try again.
error.climate_preflight_unavailable: A complete redacted preflight is unavailable. Keep canary off and check the saved registry, shadow state, and current bridge status.
error.climate_shadow_evidence_unavailable: Shadow evidence for this room is unavailable. Keep the bridge in shadow and check its target, registry, and current state.

options.disabled: Do not connect the climate controller
options.shadow: Connect for checks only — no commands
